name: shutdown drain: an in-flight tool.invoke finishes before the shutdown ack
doc: host sends a slow tool.invoke then immediately shutdown; the tool result lands first, then {ok:true}
manifest:
[plugin]
id = "confplugin"
version = "0.1.0"
name = "Conf"
description = "conformance fixture"
min_nexo_version = ">=0.1.0"

[plugin.extends]
tools = ["confplugin_slow"]
